bead.title: ADR-022 step 7: server-spawn path migration (workers.go → exec ddx work)
bead.description: cli/internal/server/workers.go and handleStartExecuteLoopWorker switch from hand-marshalled spec to exec'ing ddx work with env-vars. Legacy ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec serialization deletes when this lands. Server spawns become identical to operator-launched workers. ~200 LOC + test updates.
bead.acceptance:
1. workers.go runWorker exec's ddx work with env-vars.
2. handleStartExecuteLoopWorker translates HTTP request to env-vars + exec.
3. Legacy ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec struct deleted.
4. Tests in workers_test.go updated to assert exec form.
5. END-TO-END WITH REAL HARNESS: server-spawned worker (via the new exec path) registers via the new endpoints AND successfully invokes the claude harness (real claude binary, not a stub) on a fixture bead AND completes the attempt with a commit. Asserts the entire chain works through the new pathway including LLM invocation. If running real claude in tests is impractical, AT MINIMUM use a scripted-claude-stub that exercises the SAME exec args + env-var path the real claude uses.
6. cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/... green; lefthook pre-commit passes.
